title: macaranga angolensis var. mollis
intro: Macaranga angolensis var. mollis, also known as Velvet Tree or Velvet Mangrove, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Macaranga angolensis var. mollis include the treatment of various diseases such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. It can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world, particularly in Africa.
